title: phoenicanthus coriacea
intro: Phoenicanthus coriacea, also known as the Chinese angelica tree or Dong Quai, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is a member of the Apiaceae family and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phoenicanthus coriacea include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms of PMS, improving blood circulation, and supporting the immune system. Phoenicanthus coriacea can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
